title: NYPD Red 3 (NYPD Red, #3)
description: Businessman Hunter Alden, Jr thinks he has it all: a beautiful wife, a wonderful teenage son and billions in the bank. However his life is turned upside-down one night when he finds the severed head of his chauffeur, stuffed into a bag painted with his son's initials, in blood. But the price to get him back might be too high - even for one of the world's richest men.
